name: BigramHash(4096) + Cosine EMA + Earlier QAT + LZMA-9
blurb: Non-record submission (1xH100 only, 940 steps). Built on PR #549 stack with: BigramHash expanded 2048->4096, cosine EMA schedule (0.99->0.999), earlier late QAT (threshold 0.15->0.10), LZMA preset 6->9. Artifact 7.9MB (room for larger model). Developed using ShinkaEvolve (Sakana AI) evolutionary code optimization framework with GPT-5.4 and Gemini 3 Pro as mutation operators. 8xH100 evaluation pending.
author: Alfaxad
